summary:
Only include essential facts from above text related to diagnosis/treatment decisions made regarding the condition described in the original question. Do NOT add interpretation outside what’s stated clearly in Agent2's response.

A 6-year-old boy with known asthma presents with worsened wheezing and shortness of breath; he misses medication use which contributed to exacerbation. Despite improving respiratory symptoms after nebulized treatments, he develops severe lethargy suggestive of hypoxia-related CNS impairment, warranting urgent consideration of endotracheal intubation to prevent irreversible brain injury.
